terminal.reason: LB26001-A-04-006 direct real CAD smoke requires no-COM readiness and rerun packet approval first.

latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated sheet does not match the learned same-name reference composition.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Generated views are scattered and use a different layout from the reference.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Visible dimensions are sparse and do not cover the reference-intent dimension set.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension treatment is not reference-like and remains difficult to use for manufacturing.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated title block/frame treatment differs from the compact reference standard.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Technical notes are not placed or presented like the reference.

latest_manual_findings: The generated drawing still does not match the reference drawing layout.
Dimension placement and coverage remain visibly non-reference-like.
Title block and manufacturing notes are not acceptable for release.

correction_actions.source_note: Generated sheet does not match the learned same-name reference composition.
correction_actions.correction_action: Match the same-name SLDDRW reference composition before considering API metrics sufficient.

correction_actions.source_note: Generated views are scattered and use a different layout from the reference.
correction_actions.correction_action: Use the learned normalized layout slots and avoid default title-block-driven sheet placement.

correction_actions.source_note: Visible dimensions are sparse and do not cover the reference-intent dimension set.
correction_actions.correction_action: Create explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim objects for visible manufacturing callouts.

correction_actions.source_note: Dimension treatment is not reference-like and remains difficult to use for manufacturing.
correction_actions.correction_action: Arrange dimensions into readable lanes and reject overlap or sparse generic AutoDimension output.

correction_actions.source_note: Generated title block/frame treatment differs from the compact reference standard.
correction_actions.correction_action: Remove or suppress the oversized default title block/frame when it conflicts with the reference layout.

correction_actions.source_note: Technical notes are not placed or presented like the reference.
correction_actions.correction_action: Preserve reference-style notes, roughness, warning text, and compact callout regions.

current_006_ui_verdict.latest_manual_required_correction: Repair 006 first with explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim placement, compact reference-style sheet/title block, and rerun a fresh locked CAD job before the next UI screenshot judgement.

fix_suggestions: Start SolidWorks, open no unsaved work, and rerun this readiness audit before launching locked 006 CAD.
